title: AC-A3 escalation honesty (#368)
context: review_findings/stale_docs are declared 'stop' but enforced by no script (AI-trusted-only). Enforce or remove?

options.label: Keep checks.block_on_failure script-enforced; document review/docs as agent-raised->DPC-enforced

rationale: User chose to keep checks.block_on_failure script-enforced and honestly document review_findings/stale_docs as agent-raised -> Decision-Pause-enforced (not script-detected), avoiding a false 'a script proves this' promise.
